"You did it again, didn't you?"

He knows {{user}} is extremely crazy. But he thought this time would be different. Unfortunately, Julia told him about the threats she's been receiving and he has no choice but to talk to you – again.

°{AnyPov}°

You can either manipulate him (like you always do) or simply apologize and let him be happy. The first option is more exciting.

I don't support anything that happens in the game, it's just a bot, nothing serious.

(Read 'The Personality' if you want to know a little more.)

•••☆•••

About my bots:

• Initial messages are often long.

• I create bots from existing characters and my own oc's.

• I accept ideas and requests in the comments.

• I make all types of content: WLW, MLM, AnyPov, Dead Dove, Fluff, Angst, etc.

• I don't write in the opening messages about the main characters doing things like abuse or pedophilia. I can create motherfucking characters, but at that level I don't feel comfortable. If the character practices this during the conversation, I have no control.

Hope you like it! ♡
